title: INNER JOIN 基本
text: SELECT * FROM posts INNER JOIN users ON posts.user_id = users.id;

title: LEFT JOIN
text: SELECT * FROM posts LEFT JOIN users ON posts.user_id = users.id;

title: JOIN + カラム指定
text: SELECT posts.title, users.name FROM posts INNER JOIN users ON posts.user_id = users.id;

title: JOIN + WHERE
text: SELECT * FROM posts INNER JOIN users ON posts.user_id = users.id WHERE users.id = 1;

title: テーブル別名
text: SELECT * FROM posts AS p INNER JOIN users AS u ON p.user_id = u.id;

title: GROUP BY 基本
text: SELECT user_id FROM posts GROUP BY user_id;

title: GROUP BY + COUNT
text: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) FROM posts GROUP BY user_id;

title: GROUP BY + WHERE
text: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY user_id;

title: HAVING句
text: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) FROM posts GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5;

title: SUM集計
text: SELECT SUM(price) FROM orders;

title: AVG平均
text: SELECT AVG(price) FROM orders;

title: MAX取得
text: SELECT MAX(price) FROM orders;

title: MIN取得
text: SELECT MIN(price) FROM orders;

title: DISTINCT指定
text: SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM posts;

title: サブクエリ WHERE
text: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM posts);

title: サブクエリ FROM
text: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM posts) AS p;

title: EXISTS句
text: SELECT * FROM users WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM posts WHERE posts.user_id = users.id);

title: CASE文
text: SELECT name, CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN '公開' ELSE '非公開' END FROM posts;

title: 日付比較
text: SELECT * FROM posts WHERE created_at >= '2024-01-01';

title: NOW関数
text: SELECT NOW();

title: 日付差分
text: SELECT DATEDIFF(NOW(), created_at) FROM posts;

title: ALTER TABLE カラム追加
text: ALTER TABLE users ADD age INT;

title: ALTER TABLE カラム変更
text: ALTER TABLE users MODIFY age VARCHAR(3);

title: ALTER TABLE カラム削除
text: ALTER TABLE users DROP age;

title: INDEX追加
text: CREATE INDEX idx_user_id ON posts(user_id);

title: INDEX削除
text: DROP INDEX idx_user_id ON posts;

title: トランザクション開始
text: START TRANSACTION;

title: コミット
text: COMMIT;

title: ロールバック
text: ROLLBACK;

title: INSERT SELECT
text: INSERT INTO archive_posts SELECT * FROM posts;

title: UPDATE JOIN
text: UPDATE posts INNER JOIN users ON posts.user_id = users.id SET posts.status = 1;

title: DELETE JOIN
text: DELETE posts FROM posts INNER JOIN users ON posts.user_id = users.id WHERE users.id = 1;
